creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Mon Apr 29 14:24:58 2013
New Revision: 316822
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/316822

Log:
  - Update to 1.24
  
  PR:		178033
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Modified:
  head/www/flickcurl/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/flickcurl/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/flickcurl/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/flickcurl/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/flickcurl/Makefile	Mon Apr 29 14:23:03 2013	(r316821)
+++ head/www/flickcurl/Makefile	Mon Apr 29 14:24:58 2013	(r316822)
@@ -2,21 +2,44 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	flickcurl
-PORTVERSION=	1.23
+PORTVERSION=	1.24
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.dajobe.org/flickcurl/
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	C library for the Flickr API
 
+LICENSE=	AL2 GPLv2 LGPL21
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 LIB_DEPENDS=	curl:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	RAPTOR DOCS
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=RAPTOR
+RAPTOR_DESC=	Use Raptor to serialize to triples
+
+USES=		pathfix pkgconfig
+USE_GNOME=	ltverhack libxml2
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool
-USES=        pathfix
-USE_GNOME=	ltverhack libxml2 pkgconfig
+CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-html-dir=${WRKDIR}/tmproot
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
-CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-html-dir=${PREFIX}/share/doc
+MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
+
+MAN1=		flickcurl.1 flickcurl-config.1 flickrdf.1
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
-MAN1=		flickrdf.1 flickcurl.1 flickcurl-config.1
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MRAPTOR}
+LIB_DEPENDS+=	raptor2:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/raptor2
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-raptor=2
+.else
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-raptor=no
+.endif
+
+post-install:
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+	@(cd ${WRKDIR}/tmproot/flickcurl && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${DOCSDIR})
+.endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================

+++ head/www/flickcurl/distinfo	Mon Apr 29 14:24:58 2013	(r316822)

+SIZE (flickcurl-1.24.tar.gz) = 1852406
